title: iPhone 13 Pro 256GB - Sierra Blue
description: Brand new iPhone 13 Pro 256GB in Sierra Blue. Unlocked, original Apple warranty. Features A15 Bionic chip, Pro camera system with 3x optical zoom, and Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion. Battery health 100%.
short_description: Brand new iPhone 13 Pro 256GB, Sierra Blue, unlocked with warranty

title: Toyota Corolla 2018 - Sport Edition
description: Well-maintained Toyota Corolla 2018 Sport Edition. Excellent condition, full service history, original paint. Features include leather seats, sunroof, reverse camera, and entertainment system. 65,000km mileage.
short_description: Toyota Corolla 2018 Sport Edition, 65k km, full service history

title: HP Laptop 15s Intel Core i5 12th Gen
description: HP Laptop 15s with Intel Core i5-1235U 12th Gen processor, 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD, 15.6-inch Full HD display. Windows 11 pre-installed. Ideal for work, school, and light creative tasks. Original charger included.

title: Leather 3-Seater Sofa - Premium Brown
description: Premium genuine leather 3-seater sofa in rich brown color. Sturdy wooden frame with high-density foam cushioning. Modern design fits any living room decor. Dimensions: 210cm x 85cm x 75cm. Slight display model only.
short_description: Genuine leather 3-seater sofa, brown, modern design, display piece

title: Samsung Galaxy A52s 5G 256GB
description: Samsung Galaxy A52s 5G with 256GB storage and 8GB RAM. 6.5-inch Super AMOLED 120Hz display, 64MP quad camera, 4500mAh battery. Dual SIM, Android 13 with One UI. In excellent condition with original box and charger.
